name_cn:
Genuine quality
Monogram
Sunshine Mini Tote
Brown FF fabric mini bag model: 8BS051 Coffee fabric More details
Sunshine Brown FF jacquard fabric mini tote, with hard organic glass tortoiseshell effect handle. Equipped with a lined interior pocket, accented with matching leather trim and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for both hand-carry and shoulder wear.
Made in Italy
